name: Pillow Talk with Butt King
overview: Fresh off their breakout on Season 17 of RuPaul’s Drag Race, fan-favorite couple Kori King and Lydia B Kollins are taking audiences straight into their bed as they spill behind-the-scenes secrets from Drag Race, answer compelling fan questions, and reveal the messy, hilarious, and heartfelt truths of building a relationship in the spotlight. Will there be laughter, confusion, chaos and mess? Well, yes! It’s Pillow Talk with ButtKing!

trailers.title: Pillow Talk with ButtKing | Series Trailer | WOW Presents Plus
